meaning: n.考力代羊(一种产于新西兰和澳大利亚的毛肉两用绵羊)[新西兰一地区名]
examples: This paper represents the growth and productive performances of introduced Corriedale from New Zealand in Weining county of Guizhou province.
The test showed that improving winter nutrition could obviously increase the capacity and genetic latent energy of crossed Romanov and crossed corriedale.
